## Title: Fix ITTI scheduling priority inversion

### Summary
The ITTI (Inter-Task Interface) message handling suffers from a priority inversion issue where non-message file descriptor events can be processed before higher-priority message queue events. The root cause is in `itti_receive_msg()`, which uses a legacy loop condition that exits when multiple file descriptors are present, even if the message queue is empty. This allows lower-priority subscribed FD events to be serviced before message
